speaker: Charlie
text: The new gateway design uses rate limiting and circuit breakers.

speaker: Bob
text: I need to benchmark the throughput by next Tuesday.

speaker: Bob
text: The current numbers are not good enough.

speaker: Diana
text: Let's schedule a follow-up meeting after the benchmarks are done.

speaker: Charlie
text: I should also update the architecture diagram to reflect the changes.

speaker: Bob
